actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 20-year-old man has been arrested after a man was attacked at Manchester Piccadilly station.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been charged with murder after another man died following a stabbing in Isleworth.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Councillors have voted to stop supplying black bin bags to households in Kirklees, West Yorkshire.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police are appealing for information after two men were reported to have robbed a man in Minster, Kent.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Seven Chelsea fans have been charged after trouble marred their side's 1-0 win over West Brom.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 42-year-old man has been charged over the murder of a 42-year-old man in Leeds in 1995.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A US court has charged Ahmed Abu Khattala, a Libyan militia leader, with murder over the 2012 attack on the US consulate in Benghazi.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman has died and two others have been injured after a crash near Ellon in Aberdeenshire.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Executive Office has approved a business case for a 62,000 sq ft office development at Ebrington in Derry.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Pro12 fixtures have been announced for 2016-17.
